desc: The wiki is a collaborative space where you can find all the information you need to become a Brute master.
restartAfterRankup: You will then restart at lvl 1 with the same destiny, but with the possibility to make different level up choices if you want to.
previousDestiny: The previous destiny will be highlighted in red when leveling up.
autoRegister: Automatic registration for brutes that registered for the daily tournament
activePreviousDay: Must have fought the previous day
addedDelayedXP: If you won {{daily}} fights in the daily tournament and {{global}} fights in the global tournament, you'll get {{total}} XP the following day.
unregisteredOnly: Restricted to brutes that didn't register for the daily tournament
bossExplanation: The boss has a given amount of HP, it will require multiple daily fights to beat it. Once you defeat it, you will unlock 5 more brutes slots for your clan (50 members limit). You will also earn a boss ticket (no utility yet) & gold.
noSacrificeSameDay: You can't sacrifice a brute the day of its creation.
sameNameAfterSacrifice: Once sacrified, you can create a new brute using the same name.
resetExample: At some point you might want to reset your brute because you didn't like what you got after level 10 for example; or you might want to explore another branch of your destiny.
resetExample2: It will cost you 100 gold and your brute will restart at level 1 with the same rank.
pupilExplanation: Pupils don't give XP as they used to in previous game versions. But you can still get pupils by sharing the link in the top right corner of your cell.
